title: narcissus jonquilla var. minutiflorus
intro: Narcissus jonquilla var. minutiflorus, a rare and lesser-known variety of the common jonquil, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant is known for its delicate, fragrant flowers and is often used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Narcissus jonquilla var. minutiflorus include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, or as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress relief.
